headline.purpose: Login page title and page-level headings. Largest type in the system. Rarely used outside the login screen.

card-name.purpose: Card student name field. Smaller than Headline but heavier (800 weight) — authority through density, not size.

title.purpose: Card field values, ID number. font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on numeric fields.

body.purpose: Button labels, nav links, form input text. The floor of legible UI chrome.

label.purpose: Card field labels, form section headers, badge text. ALL CAPS always. Never for body content.

shadows.name: card-float
shadows.purpose: Reserved exclusively for the ID card. The violet-tinted outer glow ties the shadow to the card's own gradient color.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (buttons, inputs, nav links). 0.2s duration.

motion.name: ease-fast
motion.purpose: Quick micro-interactions (font selector, barra option). 0.15s duration.

breakpoints.name: mobile
breakpoints.note: Card switches from fixed 400px to calc(100vw - 32px) at this breakpoint.

breakpoints.name: tablet
breakpoints.note: Free generator switches from 3-column to single-column stacked layout.

components.name: Primary Button (Download)
components.description: The main action below the ID card preview. Pale pill shape — maximum contrast against near-black background.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="M21 15v4a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2v-4"/><polyline points="7 10 12 15 17 10"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="3"/></svg> Descargar PNG</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 11px 20px; border-radius: 50px; border: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: #F0EBF8; color: #2C1B45; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ffffff; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(200,168,76,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Login Button
components.description: Full-width form primary action on the login screen. Filled purple — assertive, belongs to the form grid.
components.css: .ds-btn-login { width: 100%; background: #5B3A9E; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 10px; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; padding: 13px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-btn-login:hover { background: #6d49b8; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-login:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with faint border — recedes into the dark background, used for optional actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; padding: 11px 20px; border-radius: 8px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); color: #ffffff; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.2s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form text field. Recessed glass look — nearly invisible at rest, Interface Violet border on focus.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; } .ds-label { font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.3px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-radius: 8px; color: #ffffff; font-size: 12px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; padding: 7px 9px; outline: none; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s, background 0.2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.20); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(124,93,200,0.55); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Sticky top nav. Dark glass bar with tonal bottom border. Active link shown with Soft Lavender bottom indicator.
components.html:
ULACITcarnés digitales
  • Mi carné
  • Generador libre
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; width: 100%; height: 52px; background: #1a0d30; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(124,93,200,0.25); display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 20px; gap: 32px; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-nav-brand { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-nav-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; letter-spacing: 1px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-sub { font-size: 10px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.4); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-link { display: inline-block; padding: 6px 14px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.38); text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; height: 52px; line-height: 40px; transition: color 0.15s, border-color 0.15s; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.70); } .ds-nav-link--active { color: #ffffff; border-bottom-color: #a78bfa; }

components.name: Form Panel
components.description: The dark glass container grouping form fields. Darker than inputs, same opacity-layering language.
components.html:
Datos del carné
fields go here
components.css: .ds-form-panel { background: #1a0d30; border: 1px solid rgba(124,93,200,0.22); border-radius: 12px; padding: 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; } .ds-form-title { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.5px; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.38); font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-form-content { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }

components.name: Badge Pill
components.description: Institution type marker in the card header. Off-white pill with tiny uppercase text — reads as an official stamp.
components.css: .ds-badge { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.8px; color: #2C1B45; background: #F0EBF8; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; display: inline-block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; }

components.name: ID Card
components.description: The primary artifact — the exported digital student ID. Every other component serves this one.
components.html:
ULACITEstudiante
TitularMaría González
ProgramaBach. Ingeniería en Sistemas
ID1-2345-6789
Válido desde — hasta:Enero 2023 — Dic 2027
components.css: .ds-card-scene { width: 400px; height: 252px; position: relative; } .ds-card-front { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 18px; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(145deg, #2C1B45 0%, #3a2260 40%, #3D2565 100%); box-shadow: 0 20px 50px rgba(44,27,69,0.6), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5); isolation: isolate; } .ds-card-front::before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: linear-gradient(165deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.07) 0%, transparent 45%); border-radius: 18px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 20; } .ds-card-colorbar { position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 5px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #5B55D6 0%, #5B55D6 25%, #2EBD6E 25%, #2EBD6E 50%, #7CC840 50%, #7CC840 75%, #F07840 75%, #F07840 100%); z-index: 10; } .ds-card-content { position: relative; z-index: 5; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 16px 18px 22px; } .ds-card-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-inst { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: white; letter-spacing: 0.3px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-badge { font-size: 8px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.8px; color: #2C1B45; background: #F0EBF8; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 20px; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-card-body { display: flex; gap: 14px; flex: 1; min-height: 0; } .ds-card-photo { flex-shrink: 0; width: 76px; height: 95px; border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); } .ds-card-info { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 7px; min-width: 0; } .ds-card-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1px; } .ds-field-lbl { font-size: 7.5px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1.4px; color: #7C5DC8; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-field-val { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1.25; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-field-val--name { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.2px; } .ds-card-footer { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-end; padding-top: 9px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-id-number { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: white; letter-spacing: 1.5px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; display: block; } .ds-validity { font-size: 10px; font-weight: 800; color: #c8a84c; letter-spacing: 0.5px; display: block; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'SF Pro Display', 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif; }

narrative.overview:
Precision-made replica of something institutional, hand-crafted. The interface exists to produce one artifact: a document that looks indistinguishable from an official institutional credential. Every UI decision defers to the card. Surrounding chrome dissolves into the near-black background, leaving only the card as a three-dimensional object suspended in darkness.

The system runs on two opposing forces held in deliberate tension: the near-void background eliminates all visual noise, while the card itself is richly crafted — gradient depth, shadow, micro-detail in typography, a gold validity date, the ULACIT colorbar as a precise institutional signal. The darkness is the silence that makes the card speak.

This system explicitly rejects: government-portal stiffness (heavy borders, bureaucratic form grids); Bootstrap default (undesigned scaffolding, visible framework bones); generic SaaS purple (the kind saturating dashboards and landing pages everywhere).
keyCharacteristics: Near-void backgrounds make the card the only foreground object
Two-layer logic: the page is infrastructure, the card is product
System sans at every scale — no decorative typefaces, no expressive weight shifts outside the card
Labels reduced to near-invisible status markers (ALL CAPS, tiny, 35–38% opacity)
Interactions feel mechanical: crisp focus states, direct 0.15–0.2s transitions, no bounce or elastic

rules.name: The Amber Lock Rule
rules.body: Validity Amber (#c8a84c) appears on exactly one element in the entire system: the card's validity date text. Adding it anywhere else destroys the scarcity signal that gives it authority. Prohibited.

rules.name: The Quad Separation Rule
rules.body: The four ULACIT icon colors are brand property, not design system tokens. Use them only in the logo SVG and the ULACIT colorbar. Never as button fills, badge backgrounds, or hover states.

rules.name: The Weight-Only Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: All type is from the same family at every scale. Distinguish levels through size and weight, never through font switching. A serif accent, display typeface, or mono body would break the system's precision character.

rules.name: The Card-Only Float Rule
rules.body: The box-shadow float treatment is exclusive to the ID card. All other surfaces — form panels, dropdowns, tooltips, modals — must use opacity-layered backgrounds instead. If you reach for box-shadow on anything other than the card, stop.

dos: Do use the #1a0d30 → #060410 background spectrum. The near-void body makes the card float.
Do keep Validity Amber (#c8a84c) on the card date field exclusively — one token, one purpose.
Do use opacity-layered surfaces (rgba(255,255,255,0.04–0.10)) for all UI panels.
Do apply the Card Float shadow (0 20px 50px rgba(44,27,69,0.6), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.5)) to the ID card exclusively.
Do write all labels at ALL CAPS with 1.3–1.8px letter-spacing.
Do use Soft Lavender (#a78bfa) for interactive active states only. Never as a background fill on large surfaces.
Do use font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums on the ID number and any numerical code fields.
Do keep all transitions between 0.15s and 0.2s.
donts: Don't use heavy borders, stiff form grids, or side-stripe accent borders. This is not a government portal.
Don't use Bootstrap-default aesthetics — visible scaffolding, generic rounded rectangles with flat-blue fills.
Don't use generic SaaS purple — light purple on white, hero sections with stat numbers, identical card grids.
Don't apply box-shadow to anything except the ID card. Form panels, buttons, inputs: flat, always.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient). Validity Amber is a solid color; the constraint is the point.
Don't use the ULACIT icon quad colors (#5B55D6, #2EBD6E, #7CC840, #F07840) as UI chrome.
Don't add a second box-shadow to the card or modify the existing violet-tinted outer glow.
Don't lower the card's background opacity. The card is the export artifact; it must be fully opaque.
Don't use saturated red (#ef4444) for errors. Error Rose (#f87171) only.
Don't increase the background pattern SVG opacity above 4%. It is a texture, not a visible graphic.
